features.name: class task with delay statement
features.description: Code should include a class with a task that contains a delay statement (#N) inside the task body

features.name: fork join_none with class task call
features.description: Code should include a fork join_none block containing a call to a class instance method that has internal timing

features.name: fork inlining with await-less task call
features.description: Code should include a fork with a task call that initially has no await but later gets wrapped in co_await during AST traversal
features.snippet:
fork
   obj.dly;  // no await at this point, could be inlined
join_none
